presets.name: Теплый дружелюбный
presets.instruction: Speak in a warm, friendly, natural tone with smooth intonation, relaxed pacing, clear articulation, and an approachable emotional delivery.

presets.name: Спокойный мягкий
presets.instruction: Speak in a calm, soft, soothing tone with gentle emphasis, stable rhythm, smooth phrasing, and restrained emotional movement.

presets.name: Энергичный выразительный
presets.instruction: Speak with energetic delivery, lively rhythm, expressive emphasis, dynamic intonation, and a confident forward-moving pace.

presets.name: Кинематографичный драматичный
presets.instruction: Speak with cinematic dramatic delivery, deliberate pacing, meaningful pauses, strong emphasis on key words, and emotionally weighty phrasing.

presets.name: Интимный тихий
presets.instruction: Speak in a quiet intimate manner with soft articulation, close and personal delivery, gentle breathiness, and slow controlled pacing.

presets.name: Уверенный авторитетный
presets.instruction: Speak with an authoritative confident tone, firm articulation, controlled rhythm, precise emphasis, and composed emotional restraint.

presets.name: Игривый легкий
presets.instruction: Speak in a playful lighthearted style with buoyant rhythm, lively phrasing, varied intonation, and a cheerful emotional color.

presets.name: Серьезный сдержанный
presets.instruction: Speak in a serious composed manner with restrained expression, even pacing, minimal ornamentation, and steady neutral authority.

presets.name: Усталый мягкий
presets.instruction: Speak with a tired gentle delivery, slightly uneven rhythm, softened articulation, subtle emotional fatigue, and natural falling phrase endings.

presets.name: Эмоциональный уязвимый
presets.instruction: Speak with emotional vulnerability, soft phrasing, delicate emphasis, slight hesitations, and a tender expressive tone.

presets.name: Резкий интенсивный
presets.instruction: Speak with intense emotional pressure, sharp articulation, fast pacing, strong emphasis, and an urgent forceful delivery.

presets.name: Нейтральный профессиональный
presets.instruction: Speak in a neutral professional style with clean pronunciation, balanced rhythm, moderate pacing, minimal emotional coloring, and clear informative delivery.
